author: RulinShao
name: Depth Recurrence + Banked Muon + Pre-Quant TTT (22ep, tuned warmdown)
blurb: 3-layer depth recurrence (layers 3,4,5 looped, recur_start=3000) + parameter-banked Parallel Muon + Pre-quant AdamW TTT (22ep lr=0.00025). warmdown_frac=0.667. SP8192, SDClip GPTQ int6 + brotli. 3-seed H100: 1.06261 BPB.
technique_summary: Depth Recurrence (3,4,5 start=3000) + Banked Muon + TTT 22ep lr=2.5e-4 + warmdown_frac=0.667 + SP8192
